'''yabuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanomethemoglobin|cyanomethemoglobin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanomethemoglobin|cyanomethemoglobin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yabuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæbizith|yæbizith]] || [[word:yæbizij|yæbizij]] || [[word:yæbizish|yæbizish]] || [[word:yæbizi|yæbizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabubuzuth|yabubuzuth]] || [[word:yabubuzuj|yabubuzuj]] || [[word:yabubuzush|yabubuzush]] || [[word:yabubuzu|yabubuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabuzuth|yabuzuth]] || [[word:yabuzuj|yabuzuj]] || [[word:yabuzush|yabuzush]] || [[word:yabuzu|yabuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabufzufth|yabufzufth]] || [[word:yabufzufj|yabufzufj]] || [[word:yabufzufsh|yabufzufsh]] || [[word:yabufzuf|yabufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yabuzuthu|yabuzuthu]] || [[word:yabuzuju|yabuzuju]] || [[word:yabuzushu|yabuzushu]] || [[word:yabuzuku|yabuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yabuzuth|yabuzuth]] || [[word:yabuzuj|yabuzuj]] || [[word:yabuzush|yabuzush]] || [[word:yabuzu|yabuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yabuzuthul|yabuzuthul]] || [[word:yabuzujul|yabuzujul]] || [[word:yabuzushul|yabuzushul]] || [[word:yabuzukul|yabuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yabuzuuthuthu|yabuzuuthuthu]] || [[word:yabuzuujuju|yabuzuujuju]] || [[word:yabuzuushushu|yabuzuushushu]] || [[word:yabuzuuku|yabuzuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yabuzuthun|yabuzuthun]] || [[word:yabuzujun|yabuzujun]] || [[word:yabuzushun|yabuzushun]] || [[word:yabuzukun|yabuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yabuzuthuoro|yabuzuthuoro]] || [[word:yabuzujuoro|yabuzujuoro]] || [[word:yabuzushuoro|yabuzushuoro]] || [[word:yabuzukuoro|yabuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|307a66b}}
